title: Gli uomini, che mascalzoni...
writer: Mario Camerini, Aldo De Benedetti, Mario Soldati
actors: Lia Franca, Vittorio De Sica, Cesare Zoppetti
plot: Bruno, a young Milanese driver, falls in love with Mariuccia, dependent on a perfumery. Wanting to impress her, he shows up for their first date, in his employer's car.
